pi_items.source: Direct analysis of the ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp file from Natural Earth
Sum of GDP_MD grouped by CONTINENT yields Africa: 2,455,514, South America: 3,852,015, Asia: 32,725,478. All fall within the claimed ranges.

pi_items.metadata_value: GDP values in the dataset are usually in millions of US dollars. Ranges are broad to accommodate dataset versions.
pi_items.verified_value: GDP values in the dataset are usually in millions of US dollars. Ranges are broad to accommodate dataset versions.
pi_items.source: Natural Earth documentation and column naming conventions (GDP_MD)

privileged_info_summary: The data is derived from the real Natural Earth 110m cultural shapefile. The output file is verified to be /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/continent_gdp_summary.csv. Analysis of the shapefile reveals 8 unique continents instead of the claimed 6, including Antarctica and Seven seas (open ocean). The grouped sum of the GDP_MD column confirms the GDP ranges for Africa (~2.45M), South America (~3.85M), and Asia (~32.7M) are correct and fall within the bounds provided in the metadata. Note that older versions of the dataset may have used the field name GDP_MD_EST, while the currently downloaded version uses GDP_MD in millions of US dollars.
